heading: File Structure
body:
[Parquet](https://parquet.apache.org/docs/), [Avro](https://avro.apache.org/docs/current/), and [ORC](https://orc.apache.org/docs/) files contain metadata about the file
itself so that an application can traverse the file contents in
different ways. If you structure your data file to align with the
queries you want to run, Atlas Data Federation can leverage this metadata to quickly
jump to the right data.

Of these formats, [Parquet](https://parquet.apache.org/docs/) files provide the
best performance and space efficiency for federated database instance, as it is
optimized to parse row and column groups for [Parquet](https://parquet.apache.org/docs/).
